rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annexes when the requirement provides concrete bounds or visible feature names.
Use AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees with valid AADL scope and type compatibility.
generic_rules: Use constants for numeric thresholds in AGREE contracts.
Ensure all expressions in AGREE contracts match the types of visible AADL features.
Avoid generating assumptions for ports without explicit numeric bounds in the requirement.
Do not include AADL property names as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid AADL component features or declared variables.
anti_patterns: Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE expressions
Implementation-level bindings and assignments in component type contracts
